steps.title: Recognize the noun modifier position
steps.content: The blank appears directly after the noun profile and must modify it. In English, a word in this position must be a participle—a verb form functioning as an adjective—not a finite verb.

steps.title: Apply the participle rule
steps.content:
The present participle appearing correctly modifies profile, creating a reduced relative clause: profile appearing = profile that appears. The other three choices are finite verbs that cannot modify a noun directly.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
